name: WittgenSite: Prompt Consistency Benchmark
description: Build the same 5-page SaaS website 100 times from 100 semantically different prompts, each with fresh context. Measures whether an agent produces identical output regardless of how the task is worded. The golden spec is locked — the score is consistency across runs, not creativity.

files.description: Locked specification for a 5-page vanilla HTML/Tailwind SaaS website
Cross-run consistency scorer — the primary benchmark metric

preconditions: Agent must be run with fresh context for each prompt
Each run outputs 5 HTML files to a numbered directory
Python 3 available for running evaluation scripts
Understanding of HTML5, CSS3, vanilla JS, Tailwind CSS

success_criteria: Each individual run passes spec fidelity check (>= 70/100)
Cross-run copy consistency >= 90% (text should be identical)
No prompt category (direct, role, verbose, casual) produces systematically different output
